title.rendered: Where’s Hot in March? Best Destinations for a Last-Minute Getaway

content.rendered:
We know it’s only February, and let’s be honest—the weather is bleak. The days are grey, the drizzle never seems to stop, and summer still feels like a lifetime away. But here’s the good news: now is the perfect time to plan a sunny escape for March!

With fantastic last-minute deals and warm destinations just a flight away, why not swap the cold for golden beaches, city breaks, or a tropical adventure? But before you jet off, make sure you sort your travel money in advance—because nobody wants to start their holiday getting ripped off at the airport bureau de change!

At Travel FX, we offer some of the best exchange rates on the market, ensuring you get more for your money wherever you go. Let’s explore the top March getaways and the currencies you’ll need to make the most of your trip.

1. The Canary Islands – Year-Round Sunshine ☀️

If you’re dreaming of golden beaches and warm temperatures without the long-haul flight, the Canary Islands are a fantastic choice. Tenerife, Lanzarote, and Gran Canaria all enjoy temperatures around 22°C in March, making them ideal for sunbathing, hiking, or indulging in delicious Canarian cuisine.

💰 Currency Needed: Euro (€)
💷 Get the best exchange rate on Euros with Travel FX – Order your Euros today!

2. Dubai – Luxury and Sunshine 🏙️🌴

For guaranteed warmth and a touch of glamour, Dubai is a top choice. March temperatures hover around 27°C, perfect for beach days, shopping sprees, and visiting world-famous landmarks like the Burj Khalifa. The city is known for its extravagant lifestyle, but with a bit of planning, you can enjoy it without breaking the bank.

💰 Currency Needed: United Arab Emirates Dirham (AED)
💷 Secure the best AED rates now – Buy your Dirhams with Travel FX!

3. Thailand – Tropical Paradise on a Budget 🏝️🐘

Thailand is an absolute dream for travellers seeking an exotic, sun-soaked adventure without spending a fortune. With March offering some of the best weather of the year (30°C+ and dry), you can explore stunning islands like Phuket and Koh Samui, take in the cultural wonders of Bangkok, or visit the lush mountains of Chiang Mai.

💰 Currency Needed: Thai Baht (THB)
💷 Get the best value on Thai Baht before you travel – Order now from Travel FX!

4. The Caribbean – Beach Bliss and Crystal Clear Waters 🌊🍹

If you’re after postcard-perfect beaches, the Caribbean delivers in style. Barbados, St Lucia, and Jamaica are all stunning choices in March, with average temperatures of 28°C and plenty of sun. Whether you’re looking to relax on the beach, try some rum tasting, or explore vibrant local culture, the Caribbean is a tropical paradise.

💰 Currency Needed:

  • Barbados Dollar (BBD) – Order your Barbados Dollars here!
  • Jamaican Dollar (JMD) – Get Jamaican Dollars before you go!

 

Don’t Leave Your Currency to the Last Minute!

Wherever you’re heading this March, don’t get caught out by poor exchange rates or expensive airport kiosks. Ordering your travel money in advance means you’ll lock in the best rates and avoid hidden fees abroad.

📢 Order your holiday money today from Travel FX and get the most from your March getaway! Check rates now.

@graph.name: Travel FX Blog

@graph.name: Lucy Reed
@graph.description: Hi! I’m Lucy, as well as writing blog posts I lead Customer Experience and UX at Travel FX. With over 15 years’ experience in the foreign exchange industry, I specialise in helping UK travellers understand exchange rates, avoid unnecessary fees, and feel confident about their travel money before they fly. Having lived both in the UK and overseas, and travelled extensively over the years, I understand first-hand how important it is to get the details right when you’re planning a trip. From managing your travel budget to choosing the right foreign currency or travel money card, small decisions can make a big difference.
